message:
Update beads issue tracker with closed speculation and hardening tasks

.beads/issues.jsonl:
- Update status of multiple speculation-related issues (bd-qlt series)
  from open/in_progress to closed with close_reason "done"
- Update timestamps (updated_at, closed_at) to reflect completion
- Issues closed include speculative pipeline implementation tasks,
  robot event contract extensions, conformance validation hardening,
  TTY transcript control frame support, and cross-project
  reconciliation items
- No new issues added; this reflects task completion bookkeeping

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
